recap: Created __data/autocorrect.txt with Orochi→Oroshi seed entries; added inline correction loop in mic2txt-raw using perl lookahead/lookbehind for whole-word case-insensitive substitution that correctly excludes hyphenated compounds.
Migrated 7 Whisper hallucination phrases from removeArtifacts in wav2txt-openai into autocorrect.conf as suppression entries; removed the function and replaced its call with a plain echo.
